titleStmt.title: SII 41.106: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 106. (A.R. No. 105 of 1905.) Ambāsamudram, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the slab built into the floor of the first circuit of the Ericbchā-Uḍaiyār temple at Ambāsamudram.

summary.p: (THE SLAB IS NOW IN THE MADRAS MUSEUM.)

In Vaṭṭeḻuttu. While camping at Araichūr on the banks of the Peṇṇai river in Toṇḍai-nāḍu, the king made an endowment of 200 kāsu entrusted with the sabhā of Iḷaṅgōykkuḍi in Muḷḷi-nāḍu for food offerings in the temple of Tiruppōttuḍaiya-bhaṭārar in the village.
[Published in EI, vol. IX, p. 84 and SII, vol. XIV, No. 13.]

This record dated in the 4+12th Year of the reign of Varaguna Maharaja registers the gift of 290 kasu to the sabha of Ilangoykkudi in Mullinadu for worship and offerings to the God Bhatara in the Srikoyil of Tiruppottudaiyar. The gift was made when Varaguna was stationed at Araisur on the bank of the Pennai river in tondainadu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . bhaṭāranugrahatti ṉā
ṟ muḷḷināṭṭiḷaṅkoykkuṭi ti
ruppottuṭaiyār śrīkoyil bhaṭārarkku mutal
keṭāmai poli koṇṭu nāṉku kālamun tiruvamu
tu celuttuvatāka varakuṇa mahā rājar toṇṭai nāṭṭup
peṇṇaikkarai Araicūr vīṟṟiruntu Iḷaṅkoykku
ṭic cavaiyār kaiyyiṟ kuṭutta kācu Irunūṟṟutto
ṇṇūṟu . Ivaṟṟāṟ kāciṉ vāyirukalamāka Āṇṭu
varai cavaiyāraḷakkum polinel Ainnūṟṟeṇpati
ṉ kalam . Ivai koṇṭu bhaṭārar paṇi makkaḷum Iḷaṅ
koykkuṭic cavai vāriyarum Uṭaṉiṉṟu varakuṇa
maharājarkku rājyavarṣam nāṉkāvatukku Etir
paṉṉiraṇṭām yāṇṭu tulā ñāyiṟu mutalāka nicati
yāka nāṉku kālamun tiruvamutu celuttum pa
ṭi . Oru poḻutaikku veṇṭuvaṉa Arici ceṉṉeṟ
ṟiṭṭal nāṉāḻi kummāyattukku payaṟṟu
p paruppuri nivetikka pacuviṉṉaṟuney yu
ḻakkup pacuviṉṟoy tayirurik karuvāḻai
ppaḻa nāṉku carkkarai Oru palam kaṟi Ami
rtu kāykkaṟi Oṉṟu puḷiṅkaṟi Iraṇṭu puḻu
kkukkaṟi Oṉṟu porikkaṟi Oṉṟu Eṟṟikkaṟi
Aiñciṉukkuṅ kaṟi patiṉpalam
kaṟi tumikkavum porikkavum pacuviṉaṟune
y Āḻākkuk kūṭṭukku pacuviṉ toytayi
rurik kāyam Iru ceviṭṭu Ilai Amirtu
veḷḷilai Īraṭukku Aṭaikkāy pattu
nūṟu Oru ceviṭṭu . Āka nicati nāṉku
poḻutaikku veṇṭuvaṉa Arici ce
nneṟṟiṭṭal patiṉaṟu nāḻi

Āka Orāṭṭaikku Arici cenne
ṟṟiṭṭal Aṟupattu nāṟ
kalam . Ivai kalavaricikku mukkala
nellāka nūṟṟūt toṇṇūṟṟiru kala
m . payaṟṟup paruppiru
nāḻi Ivai nāḻip paruppu
kku munnāḻi nellāka Orāṭ
ṭaikku nel Iruppattu nāṟkalam .
pacuviṉ ṉaṟuney nāḻiyuri I
vai nāḻi neykku muppati nāḻi ne
llāka Orāṭṭaikku nel nūṟṟeṇpa
tiṉ kalam . pacuviṉṟoy tayi
r nāṉāḻi Ivai nāḻit tayirkku
munnāḻi nellāka Orāṭṭaikku ne
l nāṟpatteṇkalam . karuvāḻaippa
ḻam patiṉāṟu Ivai Iraṇṭukku
nāḻi nellāka Orāṭṭaikku nel
muppattiru kalam . carkkarai nāṟppa
lam Itu Oru palattukku nāḻi
yuri nellāka Orāṭṭaikku nel
Irupattu nāṟ(k)kalam . kaṟi nāṟpa
tiṉ palam Ivai paṉpala
ttukku nāḻi nellāka Orāṭ
ṭaikku nel patiṉaṟukalam . kāyam
Āḻākke mucceviṭṭu Itu
Uḻakku kāyattukkaṟunā

ḻi nellāka Orāṭṭai
kku nel pattoṉpa
tiṉ kalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi .
ilai Amirtu veḷ
ḷilai Iraṇṭu paṟṟu
Ivai Oru paṟṟuk ki
ru nāḻi nellāka Orā
ṭṭaikku nel pati
ṉāṟukalam Aṭaikkā
y nāṟpatu Ivai I
rupataṭaikkāykku mun
nāḻiyuri nellāka
Orāṭṭaikku nelli
rupatteṇkalam . nūṟu
nāṟceviṭṭu Itu
nāḻikkiru nāḻiyāka
Orāṭṭaikku nel
panniru kuṟuṇi . El
lām Eṟṟi Orāṭ
ṭaikku veṇṭu nel Ain
nūṟṟeṇpatiṉ kalam .
Ipparicu niyati
ppaṭi muṭṭāmai
neṭuṅkālamuñ ce
luttuvatāka vaittā
r śrī varakuṇa mahārājar .
Digital edition of SII 41.106 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
